summary: Iteration 45 - Human Action Record (Profile Page) feature complete. All tests pass: Profile page at /profile/{user_id} shows identity header (alias, country, member since), opposition axes (chaos_order, ego_collective, exploration_stability), value growth (impact score, level, circles), direction distribution, and action record. Feed cards and leaders section have profile links (data-testid='feed-profile-link' and data-testid='leader-0' etc). All regression tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Profile page properly implements RTL Hebrew UI with dir='rtl' attribute
Opposition axes values correctly bounded to 0-100 range
Empty state message 'אין פעולות מתועדות עדיין' shows for users with no actions
Feed action cards include user_id and alias fields enabling profile links
LeadersSection entries are <a> tags linking to /profile/{user_id}
FeedCard ActionCard and LeaderCard both have profile links with correct data-testid attributes
Profile page is publicly accessible without authentication

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all profile and regression tests passed via Playwright)

test_credentials: Anonymous user (no auth required). Demo users: demo_0 through demo_19
seed_data_creation: Demo users used for testing (demo_0 etc)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Human Action Record feature complete. New endpoint: GET /api/profile/{user_id}/record returns success with identity (alias, country, member_since, dominant_direction, niche), action_record (array of actions with meanings), opposition_axes (chaos_order, ego_collective, exploration_stability all 0-100), value_growth (total_actions, impact_score, level, circle_memberships, badges, streak), direction_distribution. New frontend testids: profile-page, profile-identity, profile-opposition-axes, axis-chaos_order, axis-ego_collective, axis-exploration_stability, profile-value-growth, profile-direction-bar, profile-action-record, action-record-{n}, action-meanings-{n}, profile-back, profile-direction-badge, profile-niche-badge, profile-streak. Feed links: feed-profile-link (on avatar), leader-profile-link. Leaders entries are now <a> tags with data-testid='leader-{n}'.

TestLeadersWithUserIds.test_global_leaders_have_user_id: PASS (all leaders have user_id starting with 'demo_')

Profile_Page_Load.opposition_axes: PASS - all 3 axes visible with sliders
Profile_Page_Load.value_growth: PASS - shows impact score 0, Lv.0, 0 circles
Profile_Page_Load.empty_state: PASS - 'אין פעולות מתועדות עדיין' shows for user with no actions

Profile_Navigation.back_link: PASS - returns to main app at /

Regression_Circle_Detail.circle_detail_view: PASS - builders_of_order circle opens detail view

GET /api/orientation/leaders.global_leaders: 10 leaders with user_id field (demo_0 through demo_9)
